notices.title: Planning Commission Agenda- Amended
notices.agenda_text:
PLANNING COMMISSION AGENDA


Thursday, April 23, 2026, 6:30 PM

1020 East Pioneer Road

Draper, UT 84020

Council Chambers

6:30 PM BUSINESS MEETING

AMENDED

Added Item 1c

1.	Items for Commission Consideration

1.a Action Item: Approve Planning Commission Meeting Minutes for February 12, 2026 (Administrative Action)

Approval of Planning Commission Meeting Minutes for February 12, 2026

1.b Action Item: Approve Planning Commission Meeting Minutes for February 26, 2026 (Administrative Action)

Approval of Planning Commission Meeting Minutes for February 26, 2026

1.c Action Item: Canyon Crest Medical Condo 2nd Amendment Plat Amendment Extension Request (Administrative Item)

On the request of Cameron Duncan, representing Canyon Crest South, LLC, Canyon Crest 11800 LLC, SHW Associates Enterprises, LLC and Canyon Crest Medical Condominium Homeowners Association, a six month extension to the Plat Amendment approval for Canyon Crest Medical Condo 2nd Amendment located at 11762 S. State Street, application 2025-0021-SUB. Staff contact is Maryann Pickering, 801-576-6391 or maryann.pickering@draperutah.gov.

1.d Public Hearing: Bassett Furniture Site Plan and Deviations Request (Administrative Item)

On the request of Brandon Wangsgaard of Duston Builders representing, the property owner Ikea Property, Inc., a Site Plan and a Deviation Request for the construction of a new retail building on approximately 1.24 acres located at approximately 51 W. Ikea Way. Known as applications 2025-0208-SP and 2025-0207-VAR. Staff contact: Maryann Pickering, (801) 576-6391 or maryann.pickering@draperutah.gov.
 
1.e Public Hearing: Jenson Farms Phase 4 Preliminary Subdivision Plat and Park Strip Deviation Requests (Administrative Items)

On the request of Peter Gamvroulas of Ivory Homes, Preliminary Subdivision Plat and Park Strip Deviation Requests for a new single family residential development on approximately 11.74 acres at approximately 11867 S. 700 West. Known as applications 2025-0057- SUB and 2026-0043-VAR. Staff contact: Maryann Pickering, (801) 576-6391 or maryann.pickering@draperutah.gov.

1.f Public Hearing: City Initiated Short-Term Rentals Text Amendment Request (Legislative Item)

On the request of Draper City, approval of text amendments to portions of Titles 6 and 9 of the Draper City Municipal Code (DCMC) in order to require short-term rentals be licensed and permitted and to add associated standards. Known as application 2026-0090-TA. Staff Contact: Todd Taylor, 801-576-6510, todd.taylor@draperutah.gov.

This item is being continued to a date uncertain.

2.	Other Business

2.a  Annual Planning Commissioner Training by City Staff.

2.b  Coordination between City Staff and Planning Commission (as needed).

3.	Adjournment

I, the City Recorder of Draper City, certify that copies of this agenda for the Draper Planning Commission meeting to be held April 23, 2026, were posted at Draper City Hall, Draper City website www.draperutah.gov, and the Utah Public Notice website at www.utah.gov/pmn.



Nicole Smedley, CMC, City Recorder Draper City, State of Utah

notices.title: Notice of Public Hearing: Bassett Furniture Site Plan and Parking Deviation
notices.agenda_text:
Posted on April 9, 2026, on the Utah Public Notice Website www.utah.gov/pmn/ Draper City Website www.draperutah.gov/news/ and at Draper City Hall, 1020 E. Pioneer Road, Draper, UT

NOTICE OF PUBLIC HEARING: Bassett Furniture Site Plan and Parking Deviation

Notice is hereby given that Draper City will hold a public hearing before the Planning Commission to consider the above listed request.  The property is located at approximately 51 W. Ikea Way.  The purpose of the request is to construct a new retail building with a deviation from strict compliance for required parking.

The hearing will be held at Draper City Hall in the City Council Chambers, on April 23, 2026, at 6:30 p.m.  The complete notice is posted on the Utah Public Notice Website; www.utah.gov/pmn/, Draper City Website; www.draperutah.gov/news/, and at Draper City Hall. 

To request a copy of the public notice or for additional inquiries contact Maryann Pickering at (801) 576-6391 or maryann.pickering@draperutah.gov.

Dated this 9th day of April, 2026

Attest: Nicole Smedley, City Recorder

notices.title: Notice of Public Hearing: Jenson Farms Phase 4 Preliminary Plat and Deviation
notices.agenda_text:
Posted on April 9, 2026, on the Utah Public Notice Website www.utah.gov/pmn/ Draper City Website www.draperutah.gov/news/ and at Draper City Hall, 1020 E. Pioneer Road, Draper, UT

NOTICE OF PUBLIC HEARING: Jenson Farms Phase 4 Preliminary Plat and Deviation

Notice is hereby given that Draper City will hold a public hearing before the Planning Commission to consider the above listed request.  The property is located at approximately 11867 S. 700 West.  The purpose of the request is for a preliminary plat for a new single family residential subdivision and a deviation to reduce the park strip width in one cul-de-sac area that abuts a city park.

The hearing will be held at Draper City Hall in the City Council Chambers, on April 23, 2026, at 6:30 p.m.  The complete notice is posted on the Utah Public Notice Website; www.utah.gov/pmn/, Draper City Website; www.draperutah.gov/news/, and at Draper City Hall. 

To request a copy of the public notice or for additional inquiries contact Maryann Pickering at (801) 576-6391 or maryann.pickering@draperutah.gov.

Dated this 9th day of April, 2026

Attest: Nicole Smedley, City Recorder

notices.title: Notice of Public Hearing: City Initiated Short-Term Rentals Text Amendment Request
notices.agenda_text:
Posted on April 9, 2026, on the Utah Public Notice Website www.utah.gov/pmn/ Draper City Website www.draperutah.gov/news/ and at Draper City Hall, 1020 E. Pioneer Road, Draper, UT

NOTICE OF PUBLIC HEARING: City Initiated Short-Term Rentals Text Amendment Request

Notice is hereby given that Draper City will hold a public hearing before the Planning Commission to consider the above listed request. The purpose of the request is to amend the text of portions of Draper City Municipal Code (DCMC) Titles 6 and 9 to require short-term rentals be licensed and permitted and to add associated standards.

The hearing will be held at Draper City Hall in the City Council Chambers, on April 23, 2026 at 6:30 p.m. The complete notice is posted on the Utah Public Notice Website; www.utah.gov/pmn/, Draper City Website; www.draperutah.gov/news/, and at Draper City Hall. 

To request a copy of the public notice or for additional inquiries contact Todd Taylor at (801) 576-6510 or todd.taylor@draperutah.gov. 

Dated this 19th day of April, 2026

Attest: Nicole Smedley, City Recorder

notices.title: Notice of Public Hearing: Openshaw Corner: Development Agreement Request
notices.agenda_text:
Posted on March 13, 2026, on the Utah Public Notice Website www.utah.gov/pmn/ Draper City Website www.draperutah.gov/news/ and at Draper City Hall, 1020 E. Pioneer Road, Draper, UT

NOTICE OF PUBLIC HEARING: Openshaw Corner - Development Agreement Request

Notice is hereby given that Draper City will hold a public hearing before the Planning Commission to consider the above listed request. The property is located at approximately 207 E. 13800 S. The purpose of the request is to seek approval of a Development Agreement for development of the property as part of a commercial center.

The hearing will be held at Draper City Hall in the City Council Chambers, on March 26, 2026, at 6:30 p.m.  The complete notice is posted on the Utah Public Notice Website; www.utah.gov/pmn/, Draper City Website; www.draperutah.gov/news/, and at Draper City Hall. 

To request a copy of the public notice or for additional inquiries contact Todd Draper at (801) 576-6335 or todd.draper@draperutah.gov. 

Dated this 13th day of March, 2026

Attest: Nicole Smedley, City Recorder

notices.title: Notice of Public Hearing: Organize Simply, LLC. Home Occupation Conditional Use Permit Request
notices.agenda_text:
Posted on March 12, 2026 on the Utah Public Notice Website www.utah.gov/pmn/ Draper City Website www.draperutah.gov/news/ and at Draper City Hall, 1020 E. Pioneer Road, Draper, UT

NOTICE OF PUBLIC HEARING: Organize Simply, LLC. Home Occupation Conditional Use Permit Request

Notice is hereby given that Draper City will hold a public hearing before the Planning Commission to receive public comment on the above listed request. The property is located at approximately 786 E. Southfork Dr. The purpose of the request is to allow for the operation of a home office for a business that provides professional organizing services.

The hearing will be held at Draper City Hall in the City Council Chambers, on March 26, 2026, at 6:30 p.m. The complete notice is posted on the Utah Public Notice Website; www.utah.gov/pmn/, Draper City Website; www.draperutah.gov/news/, and at Draper City Hall.

To request a copy of the public notice or for additional inquiries contact Nick Whittaker, at (801) 576-6522 or Nick.Whittaker@draperutah.gov. 

Dated this 12th day of March, 2026

Attest: Nicole Smedley, City Recorder

notices.title: Planning Commission Agenda
notices.agenda_text:
PLANNING COMMISSION AGENDA


Thursday, March 26, 2026, 6:30 PM

1020 East Pioneer Road

Draper, UT 84020

Council Chambers

6:30 PM BUSINESS MEETING

1.	Items for Commission Consideration

1.a Action Item: Approve Planning Commission Meeting Minutes for January 8, 2026 (Administrative Action)

Approval of Planning Commission Meeting Minutes for January 8, 2026

1.b Action Item: Approve Planning Commission Meeting Minutes for January 22, 2026 (Administrative Action)

Approval of Planning Commission Meeting Minutes for January 22, 2026

1.c Public Hearing: Organize Simply LLC. Home Occupation Conditional Use Permit Request (Administrative Item)

On the behalf of Tracy and Daniel Bowers, representing Organize Simply, LLC., a request for approval of a Home Occupation Conditional Use Permit, on approximately 0.39 acres located at 786 E. Southfork Dr. Known as application 2026-0027-USE, Staff Contact: Nick Whittaker, (801) 576-6522, Nick.Whittaker@draperutah.gov

1.d Public Hearing: Openshaw Corner Development Agreement Request (Legislative Item)

On the request of Charlie Openshaw and Porter Openshaw, representing CJO Holdings, LLC and P&J Ventures, LLC, A Development Agreement request for approximately 1.44 acres, located at approximately 207 East 13800 South, known as application 2025-0305-DA, Staff Contact: Todd Draper, (801) 576-6335, todd.draper@draperutah.gov.

1.e Public Hearing: Bangerter Crossroads Development Agreement Request (Legislative Item)

On the request of Duaine Rasmussen, representing Tom Lloyd and Lloyd's TLC Limited, A Development Agreement request for approximately 17.88 acres, located at approximately 13782 South 300 East, known as application 2025-0304-DA, Staff Contact: Todd Draper, (801) 576-6335, todd.draper@draperutah.gov.

2.	Other Business
 
Coordination between City Staff and Planning Commission (as needed).

3.	Adjournment

I, the City Recorder of Draper City, certify that copies of this agenda for the Draper Planning Commission meeting to be held March 26, 2026, were posted at Draper City Hall, Draper City website www.draperutah.gov, and the Utah Public Notice website at www.utah.gov/pmn.



Nicole Smedley, CMC, City Recorder Draper City, State of Utah

notices.title: Notice of Public Hearing: Juan Diego Text Amendment Request
notices.agenda_text:
Posted on February 26, 2026, on the Utah Public Notice Website www.utah.gov/pmn/ Draper City Website www.draperutah.gov/news/ and at Draper City Hall, 1020 E. Pioneer Road, Draper, UT

NOTICE OF PUBLIC HEARING: Juan Diego Text Amendment Request

Notice is hereby given that Draper City will hold a public hearing before the Planning Commission to consider the above listed request.  The purpose of the request is to amend the text of portions of Draper City Municipal Code (DCMC) Title 9 to allow private schools as a conditional use in all residential zoning districts.

The hearing will be held at Draper City Hall in the City Council Chambers, on March 12, 2026 at 6:30 p.m.  The complete notice is posted on the Utah Public Notice Website; www.utah.gov/pmn/, Draper City Website; www.draperutah.gov/news/, and at Draper City Hall. 

To request a copy of the public notice or for additional inquiries contact Maryann Pickering at (801) 576-6391 or maryann.pickering@draperutah.gov. 

Dated this 26th day of February, 2026

Attest: Nicole Smedley, City Recorder
